analysis.reasoning: Core message: An EU official is in Warsaw with Ylva Johansson to discuss the new EU Deal on Asylum and Migration, visit Frontex entering a 'new era,' and emphasize 'Solidarity and Responsibility' as pillars of a Europe that protects. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – implied progress but not about history or overcoming past traumas; not a fit. EU2 (EU is united) – references solidarity and responsibility across the EU and coordinated engagement with member state and agency, suggesting unity; moderately supported. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – highlights a concrete EU policy (new asylum and migration deal) and protective function; clearly promotes usefulness. EU4 (avant-garde) – no claim of pioneering leadership beyond normal policy work; not supported. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not about human rights leadership globally; not supported. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – focus is internal EU migration management, not global contributions; not supported. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3 clearly and EU2 to a lesser extent.
